programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th installment of the series pits Bond (Pierce Brosnan) against a powerful media mogul (Jonathan Pryce) and his wife (Teri Hatcher) who has a secret past with Bond.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: In the 19th film of the franchise, James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) is once again pitted against Valentin Zukovsky (Robbie Coltrane), the Russian mobster from Goldeneye. Judi Dench returns as M and Desmond Llewelyn returns as Q.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: James Bond's newest mission begins with a spectacular high-speed hovercraft chase through a minefield in the demilitarized zone separating North and South Korea - and the action doesn't let up until the credits roll.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Based on Ian Fleming's first 007 novel, James Bond (Daniel Craig) must thwart a dangerous Russian spy who is funding global terrorists from winning a poker game worth millions. The 21st film in the most successful film series in cinematic history.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) debe evitar que un peligroso espía ruso gane un juego de póker que vale millones y financia a terroristas globales.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) debe evitar que un peligroso espía ruso gane un juego de póker que vale millones y financia a terroristas globales.

programme.title: Operación trueno
programme.desc: Las emociones no se detienen cuando James Bond se sumerge en esta implacable aventura llena de explosivas confrontaciones e increíbles secuencias de acción submarina.

programme.title: Al servicio de su majestad
programme.desc: Cuando el Agente 007 encuentra por fin el amor verdadero, se sumerge en una emocionante aventura llena de acción y peligro espectaculares, protagonizada por George Lazenby como el carismático Bond.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Harrison Ford stars as the wrongly convicted Dr. Richard Kimble, and Tommy Lee Jones is U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard, his relentless pursuer, in this intense thriller based on the hit television series of the 1960s.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: The film probes the psyche of the young soldiers who fought in Vietnam. Their camaraderie, their struggle for survival amid terrifying violence and madness of combat.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The outbreak of World War III has occurred, leaving a group of mid-Westernrn high school students turned refugees to slowly organize themselves into an effective guerilla force.

programme.title: Wild Connection
programme.desc: Central America is home to some of the most breathtaking animals in the world. In vast and dramatic forests, several species of animals cohabitate, from the fierce jaguar to the clever monkey.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Sharks are the ocean’s ultimate predator. At the top of the food chain, many species of sharks are capable of killing quickly and efficiently anything they attack.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote heads out for a safari adventure in South Africa at the Kariega Game Reserve.

programme.title: Vicious Beauties - The Secret World of Jellyfish
programme.desc: Watching the graceful movement of these gelatinous animals is almost hypnotic. Although their bodies are 98% water, jellyfish are deceptively clever and dangerous. But where do these primordial creatures come from?

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Lionman: African Safari
programme.desc: The Lionman returns home with a new friend—a rare breed of Barbary lion who wastes no time getting to know the other cats. But like with Jabula, raising lion cubs has its challenges.

programme.title: Elephant Empire
programme.desc: The last stage of this journey takes us and our little - but growing - emperor into one of the most complex areas of the planet. In a healthy forest, the density of life is at its greatest.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: A humpback calf get spotted off the coast of South Africa frantically trying to find its mother.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: When a male leopard stumbles upon the scene of another leopard making a kill, instead of chasing off the other leopard and potentially losing the prey, he leaps in to assist.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Inside Australia’s forests are silent assassins, con artists, and brutal brawlers, seeking to reign amidst diverse and mysterious conditions. The tangled branches and undergrowth provide perfect hideouts and secret lairs to launch a deadly ambush from.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: The Barbary macaques of the Rock of Gibraltar are the only free-living primates in Europe. Learn about this fascinating species and others who have asserted their dynasty thanks to an emphasis on family.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: With the arrival of her new baby, Dominant female of the Graveyard Gang Crystal neglects the rest of the gangs needs. Low ranking Liberty, Crystal's aunt, takes matters into her own hands…

programme.title: Wild Asia
programme.desc: A rich portrait of life and death at the vertical limit of mammalian life on Earth — the Himalayas — including the most intimate and extensive encounters with a wild snow leopard ever captured on film.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Witness the epic battle to save this giant river monster!

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Every year, hundreds of wildlife attacks and accidents occur in the pristine waters of the paradise, sunshine state of Florida.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Mark comes across a snowflake eel in Queensland, Australia!

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Cambodia: The Water Kingdom
programme.desc: Cambodia's wildlife and climate is ruled by the monsoon cycle. It is a wild land of extreme rains, raging rivers and flooding lakes that create great challenges for its animals, and a fine balance between seasons.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Desert Survivor
programme.desc: In the hottest place on earth, Bear Grylls shows you how to get out alive as he tackles his biggest challenge yet - skinning and disemboweling a dead camel for water, food and shelter for a night under the stars.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new survivalists have a chance to win $500,000 by enduring the coldest location in the history of Alone: The Arctic. Participants grapple with a harsh storm out of the gate.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As they close in on the one week mark, the survivalists make some risky choices in order to eat. Serious infection becomes a very real possibility.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining survivalists start seeing their hard work pay off as they procure food.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The survivalists get serious about hunting before the wildlife starts to disappear for the winter. One participant finally has a chance to make Alone history by taking down big game, while another is set back by a nasty puncture wound.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A canyoneering trip becomes a terrifying fight for survival when a flash flood launches three men over two massive waterfalls.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A mother and her two young children are abducted and taken into the Florida Everglades by a crazed attacker.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A store manager and his staff are held up and shot by two killers. An 18-year-old has both his arms torn off in an accident on the family farm. A 17-year-old girl is kidnapped and assaulted by a serial killer.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Steven, Patrick, and Troy continue along the coast of Japan passing the Fukishima Nuclear Power Plant. Conditions are extremely rough. The men push to reach the tip of Japan.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The expedition crosses the Tsugaru Strait between the main two islands of Japan. The Sea of Japan tests the crew’s nerves. Japanese locals continue to come to the aid of the crew. Steven pushes the crew back out into a rough sea.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Deep into unexplored territory, Laramy hunts the Alaskan frontier in search of Caribou. But with a hungry grizzly on his trail, will his single-shot Hawken rifle be enough to protect him?

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains where Laramy is hunting. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy chases after the big game cat of North America, the mountain lion! Known for dropping out of trees on unsuspecting prey, will Laramy be able to find this lion, before the lion finds him?

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy honors the history of the mountain man by trapping for beaver in the lower Rockies.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote meets the man he considers to be the 'Godfather of Sting', entomologist Justin Schmidt.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote finally encounters and catches the one reptile that has eluded him for years: the spectacled caiman!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: It's Coyote versus a desert spiny lizard, who will catch who?

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: Steve is asked to build a villain rat rod and a charity bike.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: With no sign of a transmission, the crew may not make a perilous deadline.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Engine Whisperer" Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: This two-part episode starts with a client asking Danny to find and build a 1979 Camaro Z28, to commemorate the first car he ever owned.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's battle with nightmare Z28 continues as he puts it though endless fabrication to bring it back to life. While it's being revived, Danny takes a break.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has wanted a Plymouth Roadrunner ever since a couple of car nuts pulled him over a few years ago, and bought his Sebring on the spot.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: A customer wants to trick out his 2004 Harley Davidson Road Glide, but both Shannon and Ryan aren't sure they can do everything he wants.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has found and bought a replacement for his beloved Dune Buggy "Sparkles." As the guys are turning it into the ultimate 70s beach fantasy.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan is challenged to paint a Harley Trike in the spirit of Van Gogh's "Starry Night," and Kevin finds a car that could be one the most valuable ones Danny has ever seen.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny wants Ryan to fix a bad flame job on his beloved police cruiser that's been sitting in the shop for years.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny acquires a '62 Caddy which he hopes will be a huge flip. Ryan devises a secret plan for the car behind Danny's back, but when Danny finds out there's some explaining to do.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret.

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Penny Dreadful

programme.title: Penny Dreadful
programme.desc: Vanessa, Ethan and Sir Malcolm protect the mansion from another attack.

programme.title: Penny Dreadful
programme.desc: Sir Malcolm gets tragic news. A glorious night turns to horror for Vanessa.

programme.title: Battlespace
programme.desc: “Battlespace” is a futuristic sci-fi adventure that begins after the destruction of our Universe. With a militaristic race of modified humans in hot pursuit, Colonel Mara Shryyke finds herself stranded on an inhospitable planet.

programme.title: Beta Test
programme.desc: When a gamer discovers that the events in a video game are happening in the real world, he must join forces with the game's protagonist to unravel the sinister plot before it overwhelms the city.

programme.title: Farscape

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew visits a planet full of happy workers. Soon D'Argo and Zhaan start working and refuse to return to the ship.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: For people who live on active volcanoes, life has an element of impermanence to it. There is always the fear that one day their turn will come, and their home will be in the path of the volcano.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Oceania: The Tectonic Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Australia is now a solid and stable continent surrounded by more volatile neighbors. Pacific and Australian plates clash across the South Pacific causing intense geological and volcanic activity. Travel back in time through deserts, rock and fossils.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: The Tectonics of Life and Death
programme.desc: First Asia hurtled into Europe. Then, India crashed violently into the Asian continent. That shock gave birth to the highest mountain range in the world, the Himalayas. But it also released dangerous gases believed to have caused dinosaur extinction...

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: Rising Mountains and Sinking Countries
programme.desc: Effects from the Indo-Asian collision were felt thousands of kilometers away. The deforming pressure towards the East created Indochina, the Philippines, Indonesia, and Japan. How else could the remains of primitive Asians have been found in Java?

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: Tropical Beginnings
programme.desc: One billion years ago there was just one great continent on earth. It began to break apart and Europe drifted away. Tectonic collisions, tropical vegetation, inland seas and hot lagoons are what temperate contemporary Europe is made of.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: A Turbulent Future
programme.desc: Over time, the Atlantic Ocean widened. Then Africa moved north, struck Europe and birthed the Alps. Erosion, volcanic activity, and ice ages fashioned an extraordinarily rich and varied continent, ready for the arrival of human beings.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: The Origins of Africa
programme.desc: Africa is Mother Earth. Gondwana, the first, single, landmass broke apart into today's continents, but its heart is Africa. Land of rifts, lakes and volcanoes, Africa's mineral deposits testify to its eons-old history.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Africa Today
programme.desc: Volcanic activity and climate change define Africa's “modern” geological history. Recently — meaning 50 million years ago — the Arabian plate snapped off the African continent and joined Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: North America
programme.desc: North America's physical features were formed by volcanic eruptions, earthquakes and an ice age. To understand the geological forces at play, we look at the Rockies, the Grand Canyon and Canadian Shield. Also - will part of California become an island?

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Central America
programme.desc: Central America takes us back to when the world was young. A fragile line of islands linking North and South America, the islands of the Caribbean are recent apparitions on earth and may not be here to stay.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: South America
programme.desc: One glance at a map of South America says it all: Andes and Amazonian basin. Two huge geological characteristics that describe how the continent came into being. The Amazon was once under the sea.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Emily Calandrelli visits the launch pad to see the launch of NASA's Mars InSight spacecraft.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Emily Calandrelli visits with experts to explore the most bizarre space oddities in our universe.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.desc: A meteor causes Sonic and Eggman to exchange bodies. / Orbot and Cubot wake up with no memory of the previous day's events and discover that Eggman is missing.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When a berry picking machine created by Tails goes nuts and defoliates an orchard, a group of villains thinks Tails is one of them and inducts him into their evil organization. / Eggman is injured during a battle with Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After an explosion at his evil lair sends him into a time loop, Eggman relives the same day over and over. / Dr. Eggman markets his brand of tomato sauce.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: To prove that he is an inventor like Tails, Knuckles challenges Tails to participate in the local robot battle./ Dr. Eggman's particle accelerator has been stolen, and all evidence points to Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman is making a movie about his life. He even tries to cast Sonic to play a lame version of Sonic. / Knuckles wants to win the village's annual Chili Dog Cook-Off. He sets out on a quest to find the perfect ingredients.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic gets cocky about his survival skills, Sticks and Amy challenge Sonic and Knuckles to the ultimate survival skills contest. / When Knuckles is made mayor for the day, he sends the village spiraling into chaos.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy has to spend the night guarding the store and comes face to face with a burglar. Then, Scaredy tries to spend more time with his first crush.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy rids a holiday of commercialization. Then, Scaredy's suggestion box proves to be a bad suggestion that he shouldn't have suggested.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: When Paddleball camp doesn't go as planned, Scaredy tries to save himself and the other campers. Then, Scaredy becomes the Balsa weatherman.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to bring the work gang together as a team. Then, when thugs threaten to eat everything in Balsa, Scaredy must protect the store.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy wants Nestor to be nicer to him. Then, Scaredy is forced into working at a horrible restaurant for an evil cat.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: While Richard is away, Scaredy takes care of what he thinks is a sweet, innocent rock. Then, the assembly safety robot that came with Scaredy's hammock is a little too demanding.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy gets duped by a slick salesman. Nestor loses his job to his brother Lestor.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jez wants Lucius to try a youthful new look, so Lucy tricks Jimmy into swapping hairstyles. --- When the ghost of pizza-crusts-past starts haunting Beezy, it’s up to Jimmy to make things right.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is jealous when he’s the only one in Miseryville who can’t grow a mustache. --- Beezy hires a butler to clean his room, but he soon has his new manservant living his entire life for him.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy can’t stomach ‘Sludge Ice Cream,’ Misery Inc. puts it into full production. --- One of the Weavils feigns an injury and tricks his way into Jimmy’s home.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: The new Misery Inc. catalogue is out, and Jimmy, thinking that the stuff is free, orders up every item. --- Jimmy and Beezy compete to snag the coveted hoof prints of Wrecken, their favourite soccer star.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy introduces a stressed-out Lucius to the foreign concept of a “vacation.” --- Heloise, Jimmy, and Beezy attempt to unite Cerbee with his true love, Jez's boohuahua "Jazmeen".

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After two racecar-driving fleas infest Jimmy’s and Beezy’s brains, the boys vie for title of fastest Miseryvillian. --- Jimmy tries Heloise’s ‘People Copier’ and ends up with an army of ‘Himmies’ who mimic his every move.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Amber joins Jade & Chau to explain some behind the scenes conversations. Deb & Barb are shocked that Cate is considering having Nova in the delivery room. Ashley & Bar joke that Maci & Taylor need to rekindle their romance instead of cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Ashley, Tea & Chris struggle to relate when Maci opens up to Bentley about her PTSD. The Y&P moms question Mackenzie's parenting & her parenting coordinator. Jade, Chau, & special guest Amber discuss Amber's anxiety surrounding her grades.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Everyone is excited that Catelynn & Tyler will visit Carly. Leah talks about wanting a baby as she watches Cheyenne prepare to be induced for baby Ace. And for the first time in years, Amber reunites with Leah.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Briana & Brittany suspect more than diabetes is to blame when Mackenzie lashes out. Sean, Jade & Chau commend Gary for seeing a parenting coach. Ashley & Bar watch Cheyenne go into labor. The Y&P moms discuss Taylor's decision to get therapy.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Leah tears up as Cheyenne gives birth to her son. Briana swoons over Tyler's romantic plans for Catelynn's babymoon. Barb & Deb take Taylor's side when he argues with Maci over childcare. Jade & Chau are excited to see Mackenzie's Dad.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Leah, Jaylan & Corey are glad to see Gary join Amber for her therapy session. The Y& P moms are shocked by Maci & Taylor's relationship talk. Briana & Brittany question Mackenzie's parenting. Ashley & Bar are concerned & happy when Catelynn gives birth.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Briana, Roxanne & Brittany are conflicted about Gary not telling Amber that Leah's seeing a therapist. Leah relates to Maci that she puts too much pressure on herself. Jade, Chau & Christy doubt social media is responsible for Makenzie's issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Amber, Catelynn, Maci, Cheyenne, Leah, Briana, Ashley, & Jade all come together and start a Group chat to stay in touch. Briana wins the lawsuit against a former Teen Mom 2 cast member.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Catelynn's anxiety rises when she notices her daughter's head is flat on one side. Jade is nervous to meet Jenelle while Sean shops for an engagement ring. Briana's stress puts a toll on her mental health.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Briana plans a trip to see her estranged father. Cheyenne struggles with the aftermath of the shooting incident. Maci celebrates Bentley's 13th birthday and fears the bowling alley will trigger her PTSD. Catelynn has surgery to remove a cyst.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Leah moves into her new house and is open to having a baby with Jaylan. Cheyenne & Zach decide they need a fresh start and look for a new house. Briana celebrates Stella's graduation and gets Cheyenne's advice on co-parenting when Luis doesn't show up.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Cheyenne supports Cory as his daughter is born with a heart condition. Amber is officially done with her probation. Bentley wants social media but Maci worries about online predators. Briana gets a mental health diagnosis. Catelynn sets new boundaries.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Catelynn invites all the moms to go on a glamping trip in Florida to celebrate Amber's birthday. Maci & Catelynn are surprised when Ashley doesn't join. Amber has a great time but the verdict of her custody case is still looming.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: After Roe v. Wade is overturned, Maci talks to Taylor about getting a vasectomy. Ashley wants to go to nursing school in Vegas but fears the environment will be tough on Bar's sobriety. Catelynn is shocked when she finds out who Briana is dating.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Sara se presentan en la iglesia, pero Jimena y Óscar ya están casados. Él cuenta su versión de la estafa y libra a Eva de toda responsabilidad al contratarlos, Juan lo interrumpe.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar rechaza el dinero que le ofrece Gabriela para que se separe de su hija, ella acepta el consejo de Sara y arruina los planes de su yerno, Jimena pierde los beneficios de ser una Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le asegura a Fernando que se entregará a él como su esposa, él reacciona con soberbia. Jimena pregunta por Libia, a pesar de los esfuerzos de Juan por mantener ocultos sus recuerdos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se interpone en una decisión de Norma, ellas pierden la paciencia en medio de una discusión. Jimena encuentra un regalo con una nota escrita, la letra es igual a la de su padre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le miente a Juan asegurándole que está enamorada de otro hombre, pero él no le cree y está seguro de que algo esconde. José chantajea y trata de obligar a Beatriz a estar con él. Julieta no sabe la razón de sus acciones, se siente confundida.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan se juega su destino provocando los celos de Paula, mientras Julieta siente que empeora su malestar y asiste al médico al sospechar que algo anda mal. Gaspar empieza a tener una crisis matrimonial por querer controlar a Guadalupe.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta deja salir sus instintos violentos y atropella a Pedro por rabia, llega a la casa perturbada, pero se mentaliza que no hizo nada. Luego acusa a Paula de atacarla al sostener una conversación subida de tono. Emilio continúa con el plan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde el control a causa de sus celos y termina peleando con sus propios hermanos. Lupe lo abandona por su actitud. Juan y Paula sufren por la separación. Modesto podría ser descubierto al llevar a cabo las órdenes de Emilio.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La pasión entre Ricardo y Patricia crece cada día. Verónica se presenta ante los Lobos como la nueva inversionista y le explica a Antonia que su exesposo árabe tenía minas en los Emiratos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza se reencuentra con su hijo cuando él va a visitar a Verónica. Antonia acepta la sociedad con Verónica. Aníbal enfrenta a su hijo, sabe que le ha declarado la guerra. El juez Villegas se molesta cuando Patricia le presenta a una sexóloga.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gertrudis negocia con Verónica. Patricia le confiesa a Ricardo que él es hermano de Alejandro. Irene se queda boquiabierta con la revelación. Aníbal teme que puedan acabar con su hijo. Julio busca el apoyo de los Lobos para eliminar al Lagarto.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se interpone en una decisión de Norma, ellas pierden la paciencia en medio de una discusión. Jimena encuentra un regalo con una nota escrita, la letra es igual a la de su padre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acompaña a Gabriela para rescatar a Jimena, su madre se ofende al saber que ella trabaja en la panadería de Juan. Rosario renuncia al bar para irse de gira con otro representante.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack heads south from the tip of South America to the frozen wonderland of Antarctica. During his adventures, Jack experiences a colony of Gento Penguins and the desolation of Deception Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he heads back to his old stomping grounds near Knoxville, Tennessee! He takes his family to his old farm, the Knoxville Zoo, and the University of Tennessee for a special visit with Smokey the Dog.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Extreme Destinations
programme.desc: From the mountain gorillas of the Impenetrable Forest, the Andean cat of the Atacama Desert, to the penguins of Antarctica, join Jungle Jack as he counts down the most extreme animal destinations on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In South Africa, Jack checks out the endangered species breeding program at Sable Ranch. Jack's ranch adventures include a helicopter round up of sable and roan antelope, as well as the trans-location of a white rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: When animals get injured in the wild, conservationists and veterinarians step in to lend a helping hand. In this Wild Countdown Jack is counting down six special stories of lucky creatures returning to their native habitats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they visit an Australian rainforest and have birds eating out of their hands. Then the whole family goes climbing to find out how life is like in the treetops and Jack discovers a rare wild bird.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The animals on today’s show like to stick together. Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the planet’s party animals, like baboons, buffalos, flamingos, painted dogs, and more wildebeest than you can imagine!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some wild canines from around the world! From man’s best friend to African wild dogs, dingoes, jackals, wolves, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Predator Alert
programme.desc: Aggressive carnivores sometimes seem like the bad guys of the animal kingdom, but top predators play an essential role: keeping nature in balance. Today, Jungle Jack is counting down nature’s supreme hunters, like lions, crocs, leopards and hyenas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack's Scariest Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a heart-pounding adventure with lions, crocs, king cobras, sea snakes, bats and Tasmanian devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon is home to some of the wildest beaches on the planet, and Pongara is no exception. Come along with Jack as he witnesses one of nature's most awe-inspiring feats -- one-ton Leatherback Sea Turtles returning to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Black & White
programme.desc: What do penguins, skunks and colobus monkeys have in common? These colorful creatures will show everyone why black and white is unforgettable. Join in as Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Big cats, gigantic spiders, killer reptiles, stealthy raptors… whether they pack poison, jaws or claws, all of today’s creatures are deadly in their own way.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into South Africa's Addo National Park to learn more about its famous Elephant population, and the rest of the Big Seven that call Addo home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Animals adapt to survive in some truly wild ways! Camels equipped for life in scorching heat, frigate birds donning red to attract a mate, geckos disappearing into the forest, musk oxen who don’t know the meaning of a bad hair day, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: The people of Maui love the endangered humpback. Join Jack, a group of seaworthy school children and the Pacific Whale Foundation for a first-rate expedition to observe these 40-ton gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Creatures of the Night
programme.desc: Prepare for a fright as Wild Countdown is venturing into the night! Stealthy hunters equipped with night vision, giants so powerful they could crush you with a single step, plus bats, rats and deadly vipers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen explore Phinda Game Reserve in South Africa alongside Lions, Hippos, Rhinos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey down south to Florida's Everglades where he meets gators, snakes, and other creatures from the swamp.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores villages that are way off the beaten path to meet the people who live there and the animals that surround them, like cheetahs in South Africa, spider monkeys in the Amazon, hippos along the Zambezi, lions in Kenya and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head into the state-of-the-art Animal Care Center at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay to assist veterinarians performing an exam on a lion!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to the picturesque lands of Samburu National Reserve in Northern Kenya where he finds hope for animals like lions, gerenuk, and Cape buffalo that have been surviving through a long drought.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: This adventure has Jungle Jack written all over it! Join in as we head deep into the Peruvian Amazon Rainforest get a rare look at Giant River Otters, Pre-Historic Birds, Caimans and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they trek deep into the jungles of Rwanda and get a close-up look at wild, and extremely endangered, mountain gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as meets the thick-skinned members of the pachyderm family. Rhinos, Elephants, Hippos, Tapirs, and Warthogs.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria again with a threat that may be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Now that walkers have shown up inside the gates of Alexandria, Rick and the other survivors are scared and outnumbered.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A simple scavenging run proves to be more tricky, when the survivors are not the only ones after a goldmine of supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After realizing that Alexandria may not be as safe as he originally thought, Rick must make decisions about where to go.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others determine that the only way to keep peace in Alexandria, is to wage a war with a new enemy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a minor success, two members of the group are taken hostage; Carol struggles morally with the lengths she has gone to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two separate groups leave Alexandria for supplies, and while both worry over the future of the community, they will face immediate danger.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El gobernador presiona para obtener información. Llega un nuevo huésped a la prisión, lo que obliga a Rick a actuar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea sale al frente cuando los habitantes de Woodbury entran en territorio desconocido. En la prisión, se genera un nuevo peligro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick trata de rescatar a uno de los miembros de su grupo. Woodbury está en estado de anarquía después del ataque reciente. Los nuevos huéspedes causan inquietud en la prisión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras el grupo debate sobre el curso de acción a seguir, Rick sale a buscar a un amigo perdido. Daryl y Merle cuestionan sus elecciones. El Gobernador restablece el orden en Woodbury y hace planes para castigar a los culpables.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al peligrar su seguridad, Rick y el grupo deben tomar una decisión. Andrea está intranquila ahora que Woodbury se encuentra en estado de sitio.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que las fuerzas del Gobernador los superan ampliamente en armamento, Rick lidera una expedición para conseguir más armas.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon set out to crack a thriving opium-and-alien smuggling operation in San Francisco and become involved in struggle for control of Hunan Province, China.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is investigating the loss of government suppliers of kerosene and copper when his stagecoach is halted by a sheet of flame.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon, assigned to protect a Middle Eastern despot from assassination, find their task complicated by the attitude of the degenerate tyrant, Emir El Emid.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two U.S. Supreme Court Justices have died mysteriously but Justice Chaynedis misses secret agent James T. West's concern for his life.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a Federal prison inspector and his side-kick, Artemus Gordon, pretends he is a preacher when the two are assigned to halt an organized outbreak of terror that has paralyzed a western community.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to protect South Seas island prince who insists on going to an exclusive health resort where assassins are waiting to kill him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West, probing the murder by fire of one of his former professors, Dr. Robey, a distinguished archaeologist, is ordered off the case at the request of U.S. Senator Hungerford.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is asking the Serbian minister to place his country's fabulous Kara diamond in federal custody until the International Jewel Exhibit opens, when suddenly the gem's case explodes and the jewel disappears.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner control her radiator’s temperature. The guys ask "What is it?" Tom helps squeeze a new refrigerator into an opening that's too small. Roger tames a tangle of bungee cords.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard solves a smelly dishwasher. The guys ask "What is it?" Roger helps a homeowner transplant a rose bush. Tom shows Kevin the proper way to change a circular saw blade.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows a homeowner how to replace a leaking skylight. The guys ask "What is it?" Electrician Peg Preble shows Kevin how to troubleshoot and repair a faulty 3-way light switch.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows how to save energy and money by increasing attic insulation. Roger makes a walkway safer by adding low-voltage landscape lighting. Richard replaces a homeowner’s old kitchen faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows how to improve a lawn with a “slice seeder.” Richard and Tom share how to drive a nail in a tight spot. Kevin gives tips on preparing a home for sale. Richard fixes a ceiling water leak.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a "pressure reducing valve." Roger discusses which types of grass are best for climates and conditions. The guys ask "What is it?" Tom installs crown molding on kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard shows how to replace the parts inside a toilet tank. Roger shares tips on above-ground sprinklers and lawn watering. Tom shows how to build a plywood bookcase using portable power tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows how to transplant a large, mature tree, the guys ask, "What is it?" then, Richard helps two homeowners sleep better at night by quieting their noisy heating system.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.desc: Tom seals openings around doors, windows, and penetrations into a house. Richard reduces heating costs by installing a weather-responsive boiler control. Tom cools things with a whole-house fan.

programme.title: Ultraman Geed
programme.desc: The resemblance between Ultraman Geed and Belial has the public afraid of their new protector, making Riku question whether or not to use his new powers. Meanwhile, a mysterious woman with a sword is hot on the trail of marauding aliens.

programme.title: Ultraman Geed
programme.desc: Ultraman Geed runs into trouble when he is unable to defeat the mechanical menace, Darkclops Zero. Help arrives in the form of Ultraman Zero, but is he willing to see the son of his arch-enemy Belial as an ally?

programme.title: Ultraman Geed
programme.desc: Aizaki Moa is Riku's childhood friend, and an agent for the Alien Investigation Bureau, a group that monitors aliens living on Earth. When her latest case seems to be tied to the Little Star incidents, the two are reunited for a giant monster to attack.

programme.title: Ultraman Geed
programme.desc: The best lead on a new Little Star seems to be a comedian with healing powers. Who will get to him first: Riku, the AIB, or the mysterious force behind the fusion monsters?

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Yapool sends the terrible monster Verokron to an industrial complex in the hopes of taking over planet Earth. Verokron's attack destroys the city, taking Seiji Hokuto and Yuko Minami's lives. That's when the miracle of Ultra happens!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Gold Egg from outer space and the Silver Egg from within the earth fuse together in the middle of Tokyo. TAC attacks this egg with a laser before it can hatch, but instead, the egg absorbs the laser's energy and terrible monster Chameleking is born.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Minami, while on patrol, observes a terrible monster attacking a passenger plane. TAC didn't see the terrible monster and concludes that the incident was an accident. Hokuto, in hopes of proving Minami right, starts an investigation on his own.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Yapool takes away a recently discovered specimen of an ancient fish species dating back 300 million years. Meanwhile, Mikawa gets invited to a classmate and popular manga artist Mushitaro Kuri's house, but this is a conspiracy of the Yapool.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Multiple incidents are reported about women with blood type-O being sucked into an alternate dimension. This was the work of the Alien Giron and Terrible-Monster Aribunta. TAC comes to the rescue with the almighty Duckbill tank but is counter-attacked.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Shinsei spaceship suddenly disappears from the radar while on its way back home from the moon. The pilot, Koyama, miraculously returns alive but is secretly possessed by Terrible-Monster Brocken. Atsushi notices something wrong but...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Mysterious Star Goran is on course for a head-on collision with Earth in exactly one week. In preparation, TAC was readying the interceptor missile Maria 1, but in a turn of events, Maria 1 gets destroyed by a revengeful Alien Metron Jr.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Alien Metron Jr., Terrible-Monster Doragory, and Monster Muruchi are brought back to life from underground by the effects of the approaching Mysterious Star Goran. Ace has a mighty difficult time battling with the three monsters.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Junko Samejima succeeds in photographing Terrible-Monster Gamas. The terrible monster soon disappears, but this was part of its plan. Gamas, who is able to travel back and forth from the two-dimensional world, was just waiting for the prints to roll.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Rumiko Murano and Jiro Sakata get caught up in this calamity but are saved by Hideki Go, an old friend of theirs who was supposed to have returned to his homeland. Jiro is ecstatic about this unexpected reunion, but Hokuto finds this suspicious...

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: In Kitagawa-cho, reports of violent cases increased rapidly without reasons. At the same time, an airplane crushed and the pilot is also from Kitagawa-cho. What is happening in the town?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: One night, Furuhashi is attacked by a mysterious woman while patrolling. Seemingly her real target is Dan Moroboshi. But why would she do that? During an investigation, Dan meets an old man who sells toys. Is this old man related to the woman?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Akira, a boy who is close to the Ultra Guard member Anne, found his neighbor acting suspicious. After receiving the report, Anne went to Akira's house with Dan, where she witnesses Dan disappearing in front of her! Where is Dan?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Fatalities of young people have been increasing mysteriously in Mt. Iwami. Ultra Guard went for investigation, where Dan lost his life. As an action to take revenge of Dan, the members went into a cave and discovers a “Camera of Life”…

programme.title: Ultraseven

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie challenges Yung Joc to a comedy contest and learns stand-up comedy is a lot harder than it looks. Stevie's daughters won't stop fighting, so Stevie enlists a secret weapon to bring them back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie competes with Yung Joc and Scrappy to see who will represent the new brand. Stevie tries to help Tommie move forward with a new career choice. Meanwhile, Faith Evans is having second thoughts about rejecting Stevie J. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: When his daughter tells him his new beats are old news, Stevie decides to takes his music in a surprising direction. Stevie's old flame Mimi Faust needs a favor for their daughter Eva, but Stevie isn't sure he's up to the task. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
